user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates in the Accept Offer stage in a list with RRF ID, name, email, contact, work location, employee class, position, applied date and interview status, so that I can track who has accepted their offer
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Accept Offer screen; When the list loads; Then candidates in the accepted-offer stage are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can quickly locate a specific accepted-offer candidate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Accept Offer screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the list, so that I see the latest accept-offer data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Accept Offer screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to switch between hiring stage filters such as In-Review, Interview, On Hold, Offered, Accepted and Joined, so that I can navigate the pipeline from one screen
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Accept Offer screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to page through results, so that I can review all accepted-offer candidates when the list is empty or long
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Accept Offer screen; When there are no records; Then a No records to display message and item count are shown
